name: AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL GROUP, INC.
summary: American International Group, Inc. (AIG) is a leading global insurance organization providing insurance solutions to businesses and individuals in over 200 countries and jurisdictions. AIG offers commercial lines products including property, casualty, financial lines, and global specialty insurance, as well as personal insurance products including accident and health, personal auto, homeowners, and high net-worth individual coverage. The company generates revenues primarily from insurance premiums and investment income.

products.name: Commercial Property & Short Tail Insurance
products.description: Covers commercial and industrial property, business interruption, and man-made and natural disaster exposures.

products.name: Casualty Insurance
products.description: Includes general liability, environmental, commercial auto, workers compensation, excess casualty, and crisis management products.

products.name: Financial Lines Insurance
products.description: Professional liability including directors and officers, cyber risk, fidelity, employment practices, and errors and omissions insurance.

products.name: Global Specialty Insurance
products.description: Covers marine, energy-related property, aviation, political risk, trade credit and trade finance.

products.name: Global Accident & Health Insurance
products.description: Group personal accident, business travel, and supplemental health products for employees, associations, and individuals.

products.name: Personal Lines Insurance
products.description: Personal auto, homeowners, extended warranty, device protection, and high net-worth individual coverage through Private Client Select.

products.name: Property & Short Tail Insurance

products.name: Casualty Insurance
products.description: General liability, environmental, commercial automobile, workers compensation, excess casualty and crisis management insurance products.

products.name: Financial Lines
products.description: Professional liability including directors and officers, cyber risk, mergers and acquisitions, fidelity, employment practices and errors and omissions insurance.

products.description: Marine, energy-related property, aviation, political risk, trade credit and trade finance insurance products.

products.name: Global Accident & Health

products.name: Personal Lines
products.description: Personal auto, homeowners, extended warranty, device protection, home warranty, and high net-worth individual coverage via Private Client Select.

partnerships.description: AIG receives dividend income from Corebridge Financial, which is included in Other Operations.
